properties.body:
[Central Baltic] LATVIAN NAV WARN 009/26
CENTRAL BALTIC. LIEPAJA NORTHWARDS.
FIRING EXERCISE IN PROGRESS ON APR 13  0400-1800 UTC IN
'M2' AREA WITH A RADIUS OF 8 NM FROM CENTER PSN N 56-41.00N 020-52.00E.
AREA CLOSED FOR NAVIGATION DURING EXERCISE.
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
INFORMATION ON RESTRICTIONS ON VHF CH 16.
CANCEL 131800 UTC APR
